message:
refactor(transport): extract send_to_endpoint and harden dispatch cancellation

Transport router:
- Extract `send_to_endpoint()` helper from the inline dispatch paths,
  consolidating sink-lock acquisition, cancellation detection, and error
  mapping into a single method. This removes duplicated match arms across
  dispatch, dispatch_with_strategy, and broadcast paths.
- Map `SinkError::Cancelled` and Interrupted-with-cancelled-Cx to
  `DispatchError::Cancelled` explicitly so callers can distinguish
  cancellation from transient send failures.
- Add `send_failed()` constructor for consistent error formatting.

Transport sink: add cancellation checkpoint and flush-on-cancel
semantics to the sink write path.

Transport stream: minor cleanup of stream polling paths for consistency
with the checkpoint-based cancellation pattern.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
